column1: # AWS credential-smell action corpus — read-verb actions (get-/describe-/list-/batch-get-/head-/filter-)
# whose NAME matches a credential/secret/token/password/key pattern, across the whole AWS API surface.
# Source: bundled botocore models under the aws-cli install. Each row: <service>\t<action>.

# a public value / a policy, per its botocore output shape). Regenerate per RESEARCH-PLAN.md (AWS section).
